description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND FS1 broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in the USA
AND a user is authorized for FS1 MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the feed level fs1AuthRequired = true

steps.action: WHEN the user views a FS1 Postseason game tile
steps.result: THEN the MVPD pill does not display in the lower left corner of the game tile
